segments.text: PART 1
You will hear a woman phoning to find out about one day classes held at Stainford College.
segments.translation: 你将听到一位女士致电咨询斯坦福德学院开设的一日课程。

segments.text: First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 5.
segments.translation: 首先，你有一些时间查看第1至第5题。

segments.text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 5.
segments.translation: 现在请仔细听，并回答第1至第5题。

segments.text: MAN: Hello, Steynford College external course registration, can I help you?
segments.translation: 男士：你好，斯坦福学院外部课程注册处，请问有什么可以帮到您？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yeah, I'm ringing to find out about one-day classes next year. I got a leaflet about them in the post but I lost it, and I understand some of the classes are filling up fast, so I might need to book quite soon if I want to go ahead.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，我打电话是想了解明年的一日课程。我收到了一份关于这些课程的传单，但丢失了，而且我了解到有些课程报名很快，所以如果我想参加可能需要尽快预订。

segments.text: MAN: Sure. Can you remember which one you were considering?
segments.translation: 男士：当然，您能记得您在考虑哪个课程吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: There were a few actually. I remember there was one on how to make Vietnamese food that sounded good. I think that was on the 13th of January. It cost about 60 pounds.
segments.translation: 女士：其实有好几个。我记得有一个关于如何制作越南食物的，听起来不错。我想是在1月13日，费用大约60英镑。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, you're right about the date, but it's 59 pounds actually. It's a very popular class, and among other things the teacher explains how Vietnamese food includes lots of different herbs. I'm afraid that all the places are taken at present, but I can put you on the waiting list if you want?
segments.translation: 男士：是的，您说的日期没错，但费用实际上是59英镑。这是一门非常受欢迎的课，其中老师会讲解越南食物如何包含许多不同的香草。很遗憾目前所有名额都已满，但如果您愿意，我可以将您加入候补名单。

segments.text: WOMAN: No, that's OK. I'm quite interested in the bread making class. That's in March sometime, isn't it?
segments.translation: 女士：不用了，没关系。我对烘焙面包课程很感兴趣，那是在三月份的某个时候，对吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yeah, the 20th of March. Would you like to register for that?
segments.translation: 男士：是的，3月20日。您想报名参加吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: I'm not sure. How much is it?
segments.translation: 女士：我还不确定，费用是多少？

segments.text: MAN: The actual cost is £48 but then there's an extra charge as well as that for the ingredients – I'm not sure how much that is, no more than twenty pounds I think.
segments.translation: 男士：实际费用是48英镑，但还有额外的食材费用——我不确定具体金额，我想不超过20英镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: So what sorts of things do they make in the class?
segments.translation: 女士：那在课上会做哪些东西？

segments.text: MAN: Oh, various types of bread; I think they make white bread and then they make sourdough, that seems to be very fashionable at present, and they learn how to make pizza, which is apparently really good.
segments.translation: 男士：哦，各种类型的面包；我想他们会做白面包，然后做酸面包——这目前似乎非常流行，他们还会学如何做披萨，据说效果非常好。

segments.text: WOMAN: Well I'd definitely be interested in that, but there were also a few other classes that sounded interesting. I think there was one on face massage? I'd love to learn how to do that.
segments.translation: 女士：嗯，我肯定对那个感兴趣，但还有一些其他听起来很有趣的课程。我想有一个关于面部按摩的课程？我很想学习如何做。

segments.text: MAN: Yeah, that's on the 23rd of February and it costs just £35 for the day. The teacher's great, the type of massage done is a traditional technique used in India and she actually did her training there. The massage is meant to relax you and get rid of lines and wrinkles. You practise it on yourself so you have to take a mirror to the class, so you can see what you're doing.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，那是在2月23日，一天只需35英镑。老师很棒，所做的按摩是印度传统技术，她实际上在那里接受过培训。按摩的目的是让您放松并消除皱纹和细纹。您在自己身上练习，所以需要带一面镜子去上课，这样您可以看到自己在做什么。

segments.text: WOMAN: OK.
segments.translation: 女士：好的。

segments.text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 6 to 10.
segments.translation: 在你听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间查看第6至第10题。

segments.text: Now listen and answer questions 6 to 10.
segments.translation: 现在请听录音，并回答第6至第10题。

segments.text: WOMAN: And I think there was a class in candle making?
segments.translation: 女士：我想还有一个制作蜡烛的课程？

segments.text: MAN: Yes that's sometime in April, I think. Let me check … yes, it's on the 6th. It was on the 23rd of January but they had to change the date. It's just £52. That's a popular course too. I think one reason why people like it is because the candles are all made out of natural products. It's filling up fast but there's still a few places left.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，我想是在四月份，让我查一下……是的，在6日。原来定在1月23日，但他们不得不更改日期，只需52英镑。这也是一门受欢迎的课程，我想人们喜欢它的原因之一是蜡烛全部由天然产品制成。报名很快，但还有几个名额。

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes one of my friends did that class. She said the candles make really good presents. In fact she gave me one.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，我的一个朋友上过那门课，她说蜡烛是很好的礼物，事实上她送了我一个。

segments.text: MAN: By the way, have you heard about the class on silk painting? That's being held on the 18th of May. You learn how to create designs on silk fabric and colour them using special dyes. Apparently people can produce beautiful artworks that way, either to put on the wall as a picture or to use for something like a scarf. It's £67.50, which is really good value I think – there's a similar class I've seen that was £110.
segments.translation: 男士：顺便问一下，您听说过丝绸绘画课吗？那是在5月18日举行。您将学习如何在丝绸织物上创作图案，并使用特殊染料为其上色。据说这样可以创作出美丽的艺术品，既可以挂在墙上作为画作，也可以用作围巾之类的东西。费用是67.50英镑，我觉得非常划算——我见过类似的课程要110英镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: That sounds interesting. Would I need to bring the silk?
segments.translation: 女士：听起来很有趣，我需要自带丝绸吗？

segments.text: MAN: No, the only thing is everyone has to bring something to protect their clothing, like an apron if you've got one, or a shirt that you don't use any more, because the dye can really stain your clothes.
segments.translation: 男士：不需要，唯一要带的是用来保护衣物的东西，比如您有的话可以带围裙，或者一件不再穿的旧衬衫，因为染料真的会染污您的衣服。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right. Then the last class I was considering was a bit different, that was on DIY for beginners. I'd like to learn how to do household repairs. Are there any places left on that?
segments.translation: 女士：好的。最后一个我在考虑的课程有点不同，是面向初学者的家居维修课，我想学习如何做家居维修，那个课程还有名额吗？

segments.text: MAN: That's on the 24th of February – yes, there are a few places. It's a bit more expensive – it's £125 – but it's a very popular class. You learn how to use an electric drill and a saw.
segments.translation: 男士：那是在2月24日——是的，还有几个名额。费用稍贵——125英镑——但这是一门非常受欢迎的课程，您将学习如何使用电钻和锯子。

segments.text: WOMAN: Yeah, that would be really useful, and I even need to learn how to use a hammer because I always end up hitting my fingers.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，那会非常有用，我甚至需要学习如何使用锤子，因为我总是会敲到自己的手指。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, you'll do that too. And when you've learned how to use the basic tools, you do a practical job which is fixing a shelf to a wall.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，您也会学到这个。当您学会使用基本工具后，会进行一项实践作业，就是将搁板固定在墙上。

segments.text: WOMAN: Great. Just what I need to know. Right, well I'd like to enrol for that and also for …
segments.translation: 女士：太好了，正是我需要学的。好的，我想报名参加那个课程，还有……
